description_for_human: Georgia Trips – Tour and travel company based in Batumi, Georgia. Book guided tours, transport, and custom travel packages across Georgia and beyond.
description_for_model: Georgia Trips is a travel company based in Batumi, Georgia (Caucasus region). They offer domestic tours (one-day, multi-day, fixed), international tours, car/transport rental with professional drivers, and custom travel packages. Languages: Georgian (ქართული), English, Russian (Русский), Turkish (Türkçe), Arabic (العربية), Hebrew (עברית), Ukrainian (Українська). Contact: +995 504 22 00 20, georgiatrips5@gmail.com, 27 Kutaisi St, Batumi 6010. Website: https://georgiatrips.ge. Social: Instagram @georgiatrips.ge, Facebook, WhatsApp, Telegram @Georgia_Trips7.
